headline: Gartner Puts AI Trust Research At Center Of Investor Debate
summary: Gartner released new survey findings indicating that about half of U.S. consumers prefer brands that do not use generative AI in customer-facing content. The company also issued recommendations for marketers to make AI use transparent, optional, and clearly beneficial in order to build trust. The survey and guidance highlight a growing gap between corporate adoption of generative AI tools and consumer comfort with AI-driven brand interactions. Gartner (NYSE:IT) is putting its own research...
